title: rhododendron calendulaceum var. flammeum
intro: Rhododendron calendulaceum var. flammeum, commonly known as the Flame Azalea or Scarlet Mountain Azalea, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Rhododendron genus. This plant is known for its vibrant red flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The flowers and leaves of the Rhododendron calendulaceum var. flammeum contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, offering health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
